title: Baked Mussels in Indian-Style White Wine Sauce
description: An easy and flavorful seafood dish that combines the freshness of mussels with the richness of Indian spices, all baked to perfection in a white wine sauce.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine mussels, onion, garlic, tomato, curry powder, salt, and black pepper.
Drizzle white wine over the mixture and toss to coat.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and dot the top with butter.
Cover the dish with parchment paper and bake for 10 minutes.
Remove the parchment paper and bake for an additional 5-7 minutes, or until the mussels are cooked through and the sauce is bubbly.
Remove from the oven and stir in lemon juice.
Serve immediately, garnished with fresh cilantro if desired.
